steps.title: Write the budget inequality
steps.content:
Let $a$ be the number of attendees. The venue fee is $40$ dollars, and each attendee adds $11.50$ dollars, so the total must stay at or below $225$.
$$40+11.50a\le225$$

steps.title: Solve for attendees
steps.content:
Subtract $40$ and divide by $11.50$.
$$11.50a\le185$$
$$a\le\frac{185}{11.50}$$
This quotient is about $16.087$.

steps.title: Choose the whole number
steps.content:
The greatest whole number that does not exceed $16.087$ is the allowed attendee count.
The answer is 16.
